texto: ...and I know what it is that's going to destroy the world. Lack of communication - reciprocal communication: cultural, political, intellectual - whatever you like. But more, it's snobbery and self-deceit, which are artificial, protective barriers that prevent communication.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Angus Stewart: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “...and I know what it is that's going to destroy the world. Lack of communication - reciprocal co…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, communication, going pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: ...and I know what it is that's going to destroy the world. Lack of communication - reciprocal communication: cultural, political, intellectual - whatever you like. But more, it's snobbery and self-deceit, which are artificial, protective barriers that prevent communication.
